meta.professor_methodology: NPW as primary method, IRR for rate of return
meta.description: Methods for evaluating and comparing investment alternatives including NPW, IRR, and payback

patterns.name: NPW Analysis
patterns.recognition_signal: Project evaluation at MARR with accept/reject decision
patterns.logic: Discount all cash flows to present at MARR

pitfalls.name: Wrong discount rate
pitfalls.description: Must use MARR, not IRR or other rate

pitfalls.name: Unequal lives
pitfalls.description: Need common multiple or AW method

patterns.name: IRR Calculation
patterns.logic: Trial and error to find break-even rate

pitfalls.name: Multiple IRRs
pitfalls.description: Non-conventional cash flows may have multiple solutions

patterns.name: Payback Period
patterns.logic: Screening tool - how quickly investment recovered

decision_tree.question: Using IRR?
decision_tree.yes: Check for multiple solutions, use incremental for mutually exclusive

professor_tips: IRR can be misleading for mutually exclusive projects
Payback is only a screening tool

confidence_checklist: I understand when to use each method
I can handle mutually exclusive comparisons
I know the limitations of each method
